name: server-watchdog
description: Universal self-healing daemon for production backend servers. Watches error logs, identifies root causes with AI, applies fixes, restarts the process, and verifies health — all automatically.

scripts.check: node --check watchdog.js && node --check classifier.js && node --check alerter.js && node --check restarter.js && node --check config.js
scripts.lint: node --check watchdog.js classifier.js alerter.js restarter.js config.js

author: dancherbu
